footer.tagline: Your cyber guardian, 24/7. The most relevant cybersecurity news, updated every 30 minutes.
footer.noCookies: No profiling cookies. Technical cookies only.
footer.disclaimer: Articles are synthesized by artificial intelligence · original sources are always cited. Content is for informational purposes only and does not constitute professional cybersecurity advice. Rights to original sources belong to their respective publishers.

home.startPipeline: The service is currently unreachable. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The article or page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page.

about.hero: Always one step ahead of every threat.
about.heroDesc: Scans 17+ top cybersecurity sources every day, groups duplicate articles and synthesizes them into a single briefing · clear, complete, free.
about.f1Desc: Our artificial intelligence synthesizes duplicate articles into a single comprehensive briefing.
about.f2Desc: Every article gets a score from 1-10. Only the most relevant ones appear in Featured.
about.f3Desc: The pipeline runs automatically and updates the feed without human intervention.
about.f4Desc: Automatic categories: malware, CVE, breach, APT, ransomware and more.
about.f5Desc: Integrate FoxScan into your favorite RSS reader with one click.
about.f6Desc: No profiling cookies. Just news, no noise.

rss.title: RSS Feed
rss.desc: RSS is a standard format that lets you automatically receive new FoxScan articles in your favorite reader, without having to remember to visit the site.
rss.feedHint: Paste this URL into your RSS reader to subscribe to updates.
rss.step1: Choose an RSS reader from the list below and create a free account.
rss.step2: Look for the "Add feed" or "Subscribe" button.
rss.step3: Paste the feed URL above and confirm.
rss.step4: From that moment you will automatically receive every new article generated by FoxScan.
rss.techNote: The feed is updated every 30 minutes in sync with the AI pipeline. It contains the last 50 articles in RSS 2.0 format.

pwa.title: Add FoxScan to your home screen
pwa.desc: Access cyber news faster, just like an app.

contact.privacy: Data submitted through this form is used solely to respond to your request, pursuant to Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR. It is not shared with third parties or used for profiling.
